title: 2:30 Zoom interview + senior-spring todo cluster
html:
TL;DR

  • May 6, 2021 Apple Note — five-bullet todo capturing senior-spring GP teen era week: 2:30 Zoom interview, prom shopping, get school dates intact, start python programming, Dave travel stuff.
  • The Zoom interview is unspecified — likely a college related interview given the May timing (post-acceptance / housing / scholarship round); could be the same Ford Family / Al Forthan / JCEF essay-cluster moving into video-screening phase.
  • Start python programming — earliest extant Apple-Note articulation of Python as a learning target, three months before the August "continue with python course" note; the through-line that becomes Bromenu / Rankett / malware lab code-fluency.
  • Prom shopping + Dave travel stuff + school dates — Yahir at 18 holding the high-school graduation arc (2021 Grants Pass HS graduation), the travel-with-Dave logistics, AND the post-school skill build (Python) in one five-line list.
  • Pairs with the August fall todo cluster (chiropractor, OSU waitlist, Ryan Fila ping, continue with python course) — same junk-drawer, same person, three months apart, same capturing the GP to OSU transition.

Note

Five lines, no commentary. Yahir at 18 listing what's in front of him on a single Thursday: a 2:30 Zoom interview (purpose unstated), prom shopping (the GP HS senior arc closing), school-dates intact (administrative housekeeping for graduation/admit/orientation), start python programming (the future-skill commitment), and Dave travel stuff (the family travel logistics with Dad's stand-in / mentor figure).

The note's load-bearing line is start python programming — first Apple-Note appearance of the verb that becomes Yahir's primary skill acquisition commitment for the next five years. By August he's continuing the course; by 2024 he's shipping Bromenu in Python; by 2026 he's running Rankett code-flows. The May-2021 start is the seed.

The unspecified Zoom interview is worth flagging — without further evidence it's left ambiguous, but the May-of-senior-year timing fits a college follow up or scholarship / JCEF / Ford interview round.

Connections

  • 2021 08 11 fall todo cluster — three-months-later sibling todo
  • python — first Apple-Notes mention of the skill
  • zoom — interview platform
  • david — Dave travel stuff
  • 2021 graduation — the high-school arc closing
  • — form
  • grants pass teen era — period
  • learn to run before flying — skill-build frame

related.label: Fall-2021 todo cluster — chiropractor, OSU waitlist, python
